masterPrompt: Mythic Natural Realism, cinematic square environmental artwork with tactile stone, weather, water, roots, and living light. Create one master composition for node body.stamina.sustained-effort; all five capacity states will be deterministic treatments of this exact Recraft scene, so do not encode a capacity state or warning tint in the composition itself. Prompt intent: Make sustained effort legible as continuity and distributed grip over distance, not speed or a finish-line achievement. Universal human-capacity force: deep-rooted vine maintaining an even climb across a long escarpment. This identity is universal and independent of any aim, goal, profession, or sport. Fractal family: self-similar living mountain watershed; root ridges resolving into vascular river deltas; long contour lines flowing through resilient root fibres; repeating tendrils sharing tension along one unbroken ascent. Parent geometry must visibly become child geography rather than a separate icon or panel. Inherited parent visual DNA: edge: living convergence of breath, tide, stone, canopy, weather, and relationship; self-similar living mountain watershed; anchor a luminous watershed spiral held at the living mountain heart | body: tectonic vitality; self-similar living mountain watershed; root ridges resolving into vascular river deltas; anchor a forked river vein crossing a basalt ridge | body.stamina: sustained mountain current; self-similar living mountain watershed; root ridges resolving into vascular river deltas; long contour lines flowing through resilient root fibres; anchor a continuous root line climbing the ridge without breaking. Transition anchor: preserve and clarify the continuous ridge root dividing into evenly spaced gripping tendrils. Neutral master palette: basalt black, lichen green, storm cobalt, glacial white, warm natural gold, balanced full tonal range suitable for later cool, clear, amber, and controlled-crimson grading. Accessibility purpose: Describe the body.stamina.sustained-effort environment as a non-diagnostic natural process whose identity and capacity state remain understandable without relying on colour. Pipeline intent 2.0.0: Generate one universal, text-free Mythic Natural Realism composition whose inherited landmark remains spatially stable across all deterministic capacity-state treatments. Single immersive natural world, inspectable detail, coherent central landmark, no decorative bokeh, no gradient blobs. No embedded text, numbers, or logos. No interface, cards, frames, badges, charts, people, faces, medical symbols, diagnoses, or aim-specific objects.
